---
include-before-body: ../_includes/back-to-home.html
title: "Scribbles"
subtitle: "Posts on teaching, learning, and classroom practice"
listing:
  contents: "../posts/scribbles/*.qmd"
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  grid-columns: 3
  fields: [image, date, title, description, categories]
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  image-height: 250px
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
---

[Back to blog home](../index.html)
